overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character ascends a large outdoor staircase and explores elevated pedestrian walkways surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements.

character in red skirt enters frame and begins leading the way up the street

agents.ego_description: following a woman in a red skirt through a neon-lit plaza toward a large staircase

notable_agents.action: woman in red skirt walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: tall poles with bright pink neon lights lining the street

building with horizontal pink neon light strips
circular tower structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at street level in a futuristic cyberpunk district illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights. The camera follows a woman in a red skirt as she walks toward a grand staircase between towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand outdoor staircase between commercial buildings

events.description: beginning ascent up the wide staircase
moving from lower neon-lit area to brighter upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide staircase following the woman in red, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket descending the stairs
woman in red skirt continuing up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical advertising screens showing fashion models
large cylindrical red structures flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand outdoor staircase flanked by large red planters and vertical billboards. Other pedestrians move in the opposite direction as the camera climbs toward the upper level, passing from the neon-lit street into a brighter plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with city views

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper plaza
slowing to look over the railing at the street below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated plaza, pausing to look down at the lower city streets

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the railing looking at the view below

entered.detail: transparent safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
view down to the street level with vehicles and city lights
tall building facade with vertical pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide elevated plaza with views down to the city streets below. The character walks along a glass railing overlooking the lower level, surrounded by towering buildings with vertical neon strips and holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway approaching transit underpass

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered walkway section near underpass
entering darker underpass area with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway toward an underpass, passing digital advertising kiosks

entered.detail: covered walkway connecting buildings with red interior lighting
illuminated freestanding billboard showing fashion advertisement
large concrete overpass spanning across the street below

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a semi-covered elevated walkway approaching a transit underpass. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with red ambient lighting illuminating the concrete structures and digital advertising kiosks lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit street level up into a high-altitude urban plaza and finally into a confined transit corridor. It begins at the base of a cyberpunk district, trailing a woman in a red skirt as she moves toward a grand staircase framed by towering holographic advertisements. As the camera ascends the stairs, the scene shifts from the pink glow of the street to a brighter, open plaza, passing red planters and oncoming pedestrians along the way. Upon reaching the summit, the view expands across an elevated walkway with glass railings that overlook the city depths and vertical neon strips. The movement then transitions from the open air into a semi-covered underpass, where the environment becomes darker and more enclosed under the red ambient light of digital advertising kiosks.
